subject: FW: Lisa Gassner - Energy Vienna
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: kellens@earthlink.net [mailto:kellens@earthlink.net] 
Sent: Thursday, December 13, 2007 2:11 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Fw: Lisa Gassner - Energy Vienna

Can u print and give to je please? Is he in the office?
-----Original Message-----
From: "SKAPA M&T Mark Patzelt" <mark@skapa.at>

Date: Wed, 12 Dec 2007 11:06:19 
To:<kellens@earthlink.net>
Cc:"Lisa Gassner" <Lisa.G@gmx.at>,       "heidi gassner" <heidi.gassner@hotmail.com>
Subject: Lisa Gassner - Energy Vienna


Dear Jeffrey. 
  
The machine is working and we I hope to finish the video within the next days. 
  
If these alternative energy technologies are of any interest to you and you are able to spare 1 hour for me I would come over to NY to give you the full picture of what we have at hand. 
  
The inventor of this machine is 65, has never seen a university from the inside and is a genius when it comes to physics. He has a track record of ground breaking inventions but lacks the power to push them into the world markets. 
These inventions are not just improvements of existing technologies or optimizations but fundamental discoveries. Most of his inventions have been initially rejected by the patent offices as they seem to defy the currently valid laws of physics. 
He is also fairly well known in the German speaking world but he is also very controversial as he is a non academic. 
  
Here are some of his developments which I could present to you: 
  
1.                  Low pressure turbine - cheapest, simplest and most effective hydro power system available 
2.                  A TRUE DC electrical motor/generator - NO commutator needed. Future drive for the automotive industry 
3.                  Hydraulic compression motor - the system indicated to you - mini to small capacity decentralised power generation 
4.                  Incipio - water motor - medium to big scale clean power generation 
  
Except for the Incipio, working prototypes can be made available for testing by experts. The Incipio would need some funding as the minimum size would be roughly 6 meters cube and would require a certain degree of logistics and security. The Incipio would for instants allow you to supply your island with all the energy you need. 
  
The inventor is not the grand master of documentation but some material is available. The best way to verify the claims would be to have someone competent expert come over here and check it out. 
  
Considering the current hype about climate change and alternative energy sources I believe these idle inventions to be worth billions of dollars if they are introduced to the market properly. But money is not the only issue. They come with a huge demand for responsibility and power and need people who are able to look beyond Wall Street. 
  
If you are interested and you are able to spare this one hour I will try to catch a plane on Friday and would stay in NY till Sunday afternoon. I would come together with Heidi, Lisa's mom. 
  
If all this is of no interest to you then maybe you could lead me on to somebody who might be. 
  
Look forward to your reply. 
  
Best regards from Vienna 
  
Mark 
  
PS: just as a little background information about me: 
  
I am 45 and I am the spouse of Heidi, Lisa's mother. Born in Sydney, Australia, raised and educated as mechanical engineer in Austria, attended several universities without degree, spent several years abroad in Australia, Asia and Africa, working several years as designer for mechanical engineering, 10 years owner of an IT company in Vienna, now 10 years trader of commodities world wide with base in Vienna and DR Congo. For 2 years now into alternative energy with focus on Africa. 
I know the inventor for about 2 years now and have seen most of his developments. He is the most brilliant but also most complicated mind I have come across so far. I have invested in his developments
